text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
114 
GAP_LTCP_COPAY_1M 
LABEL: 
Gap Long Term Care Pharmacy Copay — One-Month Supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a one-month supply of the drugs on 
this tier, using a long-term care pharmacy (LTCP) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT:
